items.title: Segway Back to School EV Sale offers hundreds in savings on e-scooters, e-bikes, more – all starting from $160
items.summary: Segway has launched a Back to School EV Sale with up to 46% discounts on e-scooters, e-bikes, and the GoKart Pro 2 – some of which are getting return Prime Day pricing. One such model is the Segway GT3 Pro SuperScooter that is dropping down at $2,499.99 shipped in its second-ever discount, beating out Amazon by $200. This is the brand’s most premium e-scooter that has mostly been keeping to its $2,700 full price since hitting the market in August 2025. We saw it get its first official price cut last month during the brand’s Prime Day savings event, and the deal is returning here nearly a month later for a second chance at $200 savings to the lowest price we have tracked. Head below to learn more about it and browse through the entire sale lineup.

items.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
items.summary: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Hugging Face possible.

items.title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads
items.summary: Yope, a fast-growing social app focused on private groups of friends and family, has raised $12.3 million in seed funding. Instead of chasing creators and algorithmic feeds, the startup is betting that the future of social networking lies in small, private communities powered by messaging, photo sharing, and AI features designed to strengthen real-world relationships.

Best Buy is clearing out the stock here by taking $247 off its listed price and landing the bundle $47 below the previous $349.99 all-time low we tracked. This bundle delivers some serious value at this price, so snag it if you were looking to buy a new action camera.

items.title: Adventurous riders won’t want to miss scoring $415 FREE bundles with the Lectric XPeak2 off-road e-bikes starting from $1,399
items.summary:
Update 7/22: Lectric has increased the savings on the XPeak2 e-bikes with $100 price cuts for the remainder of the sale. Prices have been adjusted below.

As part of Lectric’s ongoing 250th Anniversary Sale event with a particular focus on three e-bike bundles, you can find the off-road trekking XPeak2 e-bikes getting $415 FREE bundles of gear at $1,499 $1,399 shipped for the standard variation, while the Long-Range XPeak2 e-bike package sits higher at $1,699 $1,599 shipped. These two options would cost you $1,914 and $2,114, respectively, were the discounts from this brand not on the bundles themselves. These packages even come as larger bundles over early June’s Xpeak2-focused Father’s Day promotions, giving you a rear cargo rack, an Elite headlight, a suspension seat post, a fender set, and a water-resistant pannier bag. Head below to learn more about this particular model, or you can browse the full lineup of deals from this sale in our original coverage here.

items.title: Save up to $140 on Segway’s budget-friendly Navimow i105N and i110N robot mowers starting from $669, more
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Segway is offering its Navimow i105N Robot Lawn Mower down at $669 shipped, matching the price directly from the brand’s website. Normally fetching $799 at full price, discounts in 2026 have been steadily increasing over the year, with drops to $699, then $679, and now $669, which is only beaten out by the brand’s direct Black Friday deal to $664 in November. You’re getting the next-best price here with $130 savings, landing it just $5 above that all-time low. You can also find the Navimow i110N Robot Mower down at $789 shipped from $929, or the 2026 Navimow i215 LiDAR Robot Mower at its $1,399 low alongside an alternate bundle offer.
